_comment: Engram hooks fragment. ONE cross-platform SessionStart entry, grafted into the target's .claude/settings.json by both installers: shell 'bash' runs via Git Bash on Windows (ships with Git for Windows, which Engram requires anyway) and native bash on macOS/Linux, so the committed settings.json works for the whole team. PowerShell-only fallback (no Git Bash): replace command with  powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/engram-brief.ps1"  and shell with 'powershell'. Note: ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} is expanded by the hook's shell from the environment - PowerShell syntax needs $env:, bash needs $ or ${}.
